scores.correctness_notes: All three parameters correctly described with accurate types, defaults, and behavior matching gold standard
scores.hallucination_notes: Minor inaccuracy: states 'replaces any existing layer with the same label' when combine=False, but gold standard says label must be unique (implying it would error, not replace). Also adds unsolicited claim that add_layer 'delegates to pebble.Client.add_layer' which may be an implementation detail not in the gold standard, but not clearly wrong.
